title: Frunkles
description: A small mod that adds silly guys
body:
Frunkles!
This is a small, silly mod that adds a new artifical creature called a Frunkle, These goobers are made with golden hearts, found in ancient cities, and hearth heart berries, found in taiga forests!

Around the world you can now find ancient structures related to the frunkles, above ground and in the ocean depths~

Some shells give the frunkle an attirbute, whether more health, armor, or damage!

Try to collect them all!

 

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB!
